name: coven-parallel-work
description: OpenClaw entry point to the harness-agnostic protocol letting multiple agents share one git repo safely via worktree isolation, per-branch claims, and branch protection.

interface.shortDescription: OpenClaw entry point to the harness-agnostic protocol letting multiple agents share one git repo safely via worktree isolation, per-branch claims, and branch protection.
interface.longDescription: Isolate each agent in its own worktree, claim the branch with cv-claim, and rely on pre-commit/pre-push hooks to block unsafe writes.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me use Coven Parallel Work Protocol safely.
